2606.05382.title: Synthetic Contrastive Reasoning for Multi-Table Q&A
2606.05382.paper_summary: Multi-table question answering requires models to retrieve relevant evidence, link schemas, and perform compositional reasoning across relational tables. Existing multi-table Q&A resources typically provide questions and final answers but lack reasoning supervision that explains how answers are derived. To address this gap, we construct a synthetic contrastive reasoning-trace dataset for MMQA by generating validated positive traces and plausible negative traces with heterogeneous LLMs. We then use the resulting preference pairs to fine-tune open-weight LLMs with Contrastive Preference Optimization (CPO). Across Qwen3-14B, Mistral-8B, and Llama-3.1-8B, CPO achieves absolute average improvements over Q&A supervised fine-tuning ranging from 9.7%-16.3%, with gains up to 21 percentage points on MMQA. Ablations show that heterogeneous positive and negative trace generators strengthen the contrastive signal, and automated as well as human evaluations indicate that the generated pairs are largely faithful, coherent, and meaningfully contrastive.
2606.05382.paper_summary_zh: 多表格問題回答要求模型檢索相關證據、連結架構，並在關聯表格中執行組合推理。現有的多表格問答資源通常提供問題和最終答案，但缺乏解釋答案如何得出的推理監督。為了解決這一問題，我們通過生成經過驗證的正向追蹤和合理的負向追蹤，構建了一個合成對比推理追蹤數據集以供MMQA使用，這些追蹤是利用異質LLM生成的。然後，我們利用生成的偏好對來微調開放權重的LLM，使用對比偏好優化（CPO）。在Qwen3-14B、Mistral-8B和Llama-3.1-8B上，CPO在Q&A監督微調上實現了9.7%-16.3%的絕對平均改進，在MMQA上最高可達21個百分點的增益。消融實驗顯示，異質的正向和負向追蹤生成器加強了對比信號，自動化和人工評估表明生成的對大體上是忠實、一致且有意義的對比。
2606.05382.author: Ankit Pratap Singh et.al.
2606.05382.authors: Ankit Pratap Singh, Xin Su, Phillip Howard
